features.name: Running Leap
features.description: With a 10-foot running start, the tiger can Long Jump up to 25 feet.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The tiger makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Slashing damage.

bonus_actions.name: Nimble Escape
bonus_actions.description: The tiger takes the Disengage or Hide action.

tactical_info.combat_role: Striker - Prehistoric predator with enhanced mobility
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Running Leap and Nimble Escape for tactical positioning
tactical_info.key_abilities: Exceptional leap distance, stealth expertise, nimble escape
tactical_info.weaknesses: Standard predator vulnerabilities, relies on ambush tactics
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect apex predator for prehistoric or wilderness encounters
